description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a hinged, flat black lid covering the top. The body of the dumpster is painted green and shows significant rust and weathering, especially on the sides, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The lid appears to be made of a different material, likely a heavy-duty plastic or coated metal, and is slightly overhanging the edges. The front and sides feature reinforced panels, but there are no visible handles, wheels, or warning labels. The overall construction is robust, designed to contain large volumes of waste and withstand rough handling. This type of dumpster is commonly found in alleys, behind commercial buildings, or in shared residential waste areas.
description: A large, green metal dumpster with a flat black lid, showing rust and weathering, designed for outdoor waste collection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green, rusted body and the overhanging flat black lid.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rust patches and the thickness of the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal visible detail, mostly showing the flat black lid and plain back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible rust and reinforced side panel.
attribute_lid_type: flat, hinged, single-section lid made of black plastic or coated metal, no visible locking or opening mechanisms
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area or residential alley
